{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113543599C97D169C320CD3D8C2"}"},"total":5392},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7286533429985264418","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我只能说外行看热闹内行看门道，番茄里我还是第一次看到这种剧情设计得很棒的书，不是很完美，不过还是很震撼的，至少不是那种套路文。
写法上值得称赞的地方很多，足够有趣，玩梗适当，节奏把控很好。
内容上叙述女主感情往事的部分有点多，但其他后宫角色的又太少，除了女主以外，其他后宫角色的情感和态度转变还是有些生硬，内心戏份不足以让观众感受情感部分的阶梯攻略感。
剧情上的设计非常不错，代入感强，不过还是缺少第一视角以外的副本视角相关的内容，让观众对文中的世界没有时间流逝的感受，无法很好的配合文中多次刻意制造的亡国危机感。不过以政治为主要剧情支柱的内容和分析很对我胃口，也确实让我挺惊艳的。
总而言之写得很棒，番茄里为数不多的好书"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696530799,"group_id":"7229682585343888444","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个人不需要简介，怎么还得十个字，看现在够没够！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3IOiYOtOntDhWAW6W6E+ov27csq09ewBE2OmI1dmrWE","gender":1,"is_cancelled":true,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/51cdc818263941cb8985f97b486ddd11~tplv-obj.image","user_id":"4081805275200557","user_name":"用户40818052"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4081805275200557","user_relation":{"can_follow":false,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7229682585343888444","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越架空世界，做一个小小赘婿。
本想喝茶钓鱼泡妞听戏，过一过摆烂的生活，但……
“夫君帮我！” “贤婿帮我！”
“公子帮我！” “爱卿帮朕！”
罢了，闲是闲不下来了，这个天下还得我来守护。
于是，周元察查大案、整顿官场、镇压叛乱、开海开疆.……挽狂澜于既倒，扶大厦于将倾！
女帝：“爱卿，皇子……取什么名字呀！”
周元：“陛下可不要乱说，我什么都没做。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d3ba00da9198c542998a830fbb89524d","author":"俊俏少年","author_id":"","book_id":"7229682585343888444","book_name":"流氓赘婿，女帝家的小白脸","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302828","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":273,"name":"历史古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273&name=历史古代&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":25,"name":"赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=25&name=赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":378,"name":"女帝","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=378&name=女帝&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7229682589517220920","read_count":"48764","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3360727"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"1427","tags":"历史古代,历史,架空,穿越,魂穿,赘婿,女帝","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/d73985902fbb8f1f0919f4192f44fc9c~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779256476&x-signature=jzHAliRB7yW632Zj0a5v8fNV%2FPg%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"9.0176872e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032113543599C97D169C320CD3D8C2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_co
